title: Weapons & Stuff
description: Experimental weapon expansion mod that also adds other stuff.
body:
![Weapons and Stuff logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9054a01f73898fd4216af9513a9c0708f54792bf.png)
A mod adding new weapons and other stuff into the game

So far there are 4 weapons, and no utility items yet

### Why should you download this mod?
- If you want vanilla like weapons
- Early development
- Much more content coming soon
- Based on community feedback, your ideas into the mod!


Weapon spoilers:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Greatsword**
- Massive aoe with big damage 
- Cooldown: 2.3 seconds

**Rapier**
- Fast attacking 
- Medium damage

**Gloves**
- Heavy but slow damage
- Has sword blocking

**Halberd**
- Longer reach then other weapons
- Weak damage 

</details>
